title: Israel’s High Court Rejects Ban on Red Cross Visits for Palestinian Prisoners
summary_full: Israel forbade the visits, which allow the Red Cross to monitor prisoners’ conditions, in 2023. Justices said the policy violated Israeli and international law.
summary_public: Israel forbade the visits, which allow the Red Cross to monitor prisoners’ conditions, in 2023. Justices said the policy violated Israeli and international law.

IL.label: positive
